column2: g_abund <- ggplot(DIVERFORO, aes(x = factor(elevation), y = ABUNDANCIA, fill = factor(elevation))) +
aes(x = factor(elevation), y = 0, label = paste0("n=", n)),
g_rich <- ggplot(DIVERFORO, aes(x = factor(elevation), y = RIQUEZA, fill = factor(elevation))) +
aes(x = factor(elevation), y = 0, label = paste0("n=", n)),
inherit.aes = FALSE   # 🔥 EVITA que ggplot busque RIQUEZA en counts
title = "Abundance and Species Richness by Plot",
filename = "Abundance and Species Richness by Plot.png",
